_comment: Add these hooks to your Claude Code settings at ~/.claude/settings.json (Windows: C:\Users\<you>\.claude\settings.json). If you already have a `hooks` block or existing Stop/SessionEnd hooks, MERGE — add the node command as another entry in the existing `hooks` array rather than replacing it. Replace the path below with the absolute path to export-session.js on your machine. On Windows you can use forward slashes.
